title: 52.5% of designers negotiate offers, with senior leaders 2.1x more likely
summary: Regionally, 52.5% of designers actively negotiate job offers. Senior leaders are 2.1x more likely to negotiate than junior ICs. The typical increase achieved through negotiation is 5-10%. Salary history disclosure remains a persistent issue affecting outcomes.
methodology: Self-reported negotiation behavior, outcomes, and confidence levels in anonymous online survey
